name: Grilled Vegetable Kabos
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Low Calorie Italian Salad Dressing
1 medium Yellow Squash (about 1 lb), cut into 1 1/2 in. pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the salad dressing, basil, and parsley in a bowl. Cover and chill.
2. Thread alternating pieces of squash, onions, tomatoes, and mushrooms onto 8 skewers.
3. Grill the kabobs over medium coals for 15 minutes or until the vegetables are tender. Turn and baste frequently with the dressing mixture.
4. Serve with hot cooked brown rice. (163 calories per 2 kabobs and 1/2 cup rice)
